# 02a Revision

Revise the project:

- Add the missing `examples/demo.bib` (it was accidentally deleted).
- Restructure the slide function such that the title does not have a margin.
- Add a demo page that showcases margin (accent tint) vs content (accent) with borders.
- The bodies in margin and content should be aligned with the horizon.
- Fix the page number touching the edge of the page.
- Add a `examples/full-demo.bib` that showcases the configuration options.
